{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bloodline armor
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] faded to [[essence]] around her body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
